summary: Validated the 2 bug fixes on Zont.cab booking flow: (1) POST /api/proxy/booking/setup-intent now returns 401 (not 405) without auth, both POST and GET supported; (2) Checkout.js useEffect properly prefills firstName/lastName/email/phone from user object using fallback user.phone || user.phoneNumber || user.phone_number. 8/8 backend regression tests pass. Frontend end-to-end booking flow (Home → /car-selection → /trip-recap → /checkout) works for both unauthenticated and authenticated users.

issues: Date and time inputs use browser-default native pickers (data-testid=home-date-input/home-time-input) rather than the shadcn calendar/time picker component. Cosmetic/UX consistency issue, not blocking.

Passenger Details form is hidden entirely when isAuthenticated=true, replaced by 'Logged in as <FirstName>' card. Prefill useEffect still runs and populates state correctly, but if user.phone is missing from the C# /api/proxy/client/profile response, the booking submission will have an empty phone with no visible UI to correct it. Consider showing an editable phone field even when authenticated, in case phone is missing in profile.

action_items: No fixes required. Both bug fixes verified working in preview env.

(Optional improvement) Surface an editable phone field on checkout for authenticated users whose C# profile lacks a phone, since the prefill useEffect runs but form is invisible — currently the user has no way to add a missing phone.
(Optional consistency) Replace native HTML date/time inputs on Home with shadcn DatePicker/TimePicker.
critical_code_review_comments: Checkout.js is 1158 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline; consider splitting UnifiedCheckoutForm, GoogleSignIn logic, and Stripe card flow into separate components.
csharp_proxy.py setup-intent now correctly accepts both GET and POST via stacked @router.get + @router.post decorators on the same handler — clean and idempotent for the C# backend.
Prefill useEffect at Checkout.js:341 only fills falsy fields (prev.field || user.field), so user-entered values are preserved across re-renders — correct behavior.
AuthContext.js:24-42 uses raw XHR instead of the existing apiService — minor inconsistency, but functionally correct (handles 401 → logout, network error → keep user).
test_credentials: For UI prefill test, injected localStorage: token='fake-jwt-test', user={firstName:'Arthur', lastName:'Test', email:'arthurbt@test.com', phone:'+33612345678', id:99, token:'fake-jwt-test'}, intercepted /api/proxy/client/profile to return 200 (otherwise AuthContext auto-logs out fake tokens).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both reported bugs are fixed and validated. Key data-testids on Home: home-pickup-input, home-dropoff-input, home-date-input, home-time-input, home-search-btn (or text 'SEARCH TRANSFER'). On /car-selection use button text 'Book now'. On /trip-recap use button text 'Continue to Payment'. Backend regression file /app/backend/tests/test_booking_flow_setup_intent.py covers setup-intent (POST/GET 401), preorder-distance short + CDG→Paris, distance, trip-types, driver-types. AuthContext validates token via /api/proxy/client/profile — for fake-auth tests intercept that route and return 200.
rca of the issue: Bug 1 (405 on setup-intent): Frontend Checkout.js:522 calls xhr.open('POST', '/api/proxy/booking/setup-intent') but backend csharp_proxy.py only had @router.get decorator → FastAPI returned 405 Method Not Allowed. Fix: added @router.post above @router.get on proxy_client_add_card_unified (lines 508-510). Verified: POST now returns 401 (auth required), GET still returns 401 (compat preserved). Bug 2 (empty phone): Checkout.js useState initialized form with empty strings and never repopulated when AuthContext finished loading user. Fix: added useEffect (lines 340-351) that prefills form from user.phone || user.phoneNumber || user.phone_number when isAuthenticated && user. Verified by code review; UI rendering hides form for authenticated users but the form state is still populated for booking submission.
